---
title: "About"
---

ML engineer with a background in Scientific Computing (Heidelberg University).
I work on ML systems and occasionally write notes on things I've been reading.

These are rough notes — thinking out loud, not polished essays.

**Currently based in:** Germany (Weinheim / Heidelberg area)

---

- [GitHub](https://github.com/ChengYuChuan)
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/your-profile)
